name: screener
title: Stock Research on Screener.in
description: Search a company, analyze quarterly financials, and use the stock screener to filter companies by PE ratio, ROE, and market cap.
prompt: Go to screener.in, search for Reliance Industries, view quarterly results, then use the stock screener to find companies with PE < 25 and ROE > 15%

steps.caption: Step 1: Open Screener.in - India's popular stock research platform
steps.description: Open Screener.in - India's popular stock research platform
steps.narration: Here is the opening move. Let's start by opening Screener.in. This gives the whole demo a place to stand.

steps.caption: Step 2: Navigate directly to Reliance Industries company page
steps.description: Navigate directly to Reliance Industries company page
steps.narration: With the setup in place, we can chase the signal. We navigate directly to Reliance Industries company page.

steps.caption: Step 3: View key metrics - market cap, PE ratio, ROCE, and valuation snapshot
steps.description: View key metrics - market cap, PE ratio, ROCE, and valuation snapshot
steps.narration: Now the target comes into focus. We view key metrics. This is the first clean read on what matters.

steps.caption: Step 4: Review quarterly financial trends to understand recent performance
steps.description: Review quarterly financial trends to understand recent performance
steps.narration: This is where the pattern starts to show. We review quarterly financial trends to understand recent performance.

steps.caption: Step 5: Inspect Profit and Loss details - revenue, expenses, and margins
steps.description: Inspect Profit and Loss details - revenue, expenses, and margins
steps.narration: Here the workflow stops posing and starts proving. We inspect Profit and Loss details. A quick inspection here saves a lot of guessing later.

steps.caption: Step 6: Check balance sheet strength - assets, liabilities, and equity
steps.description: Check balance sheet strength - assets, liabilities, and equity
steps.narration: Now the page has something to say. We check balance sheet strength. A fast check here tells us whether the foundation actually holds.

steps.caption: Step 7: Open the Public Screens page to explore ready-made stock filters
steps.description: Open the Public Screens page to explore ready-made stock filters
steps.narration: This is where the pattern starts to show. We open the Public Screens page to explore ready-made stock filters.

steps.caption: Step 8: Open a public screen to view companies matching prebuilt criteria
steps.description: Open a public screen to view companies matching prebuilt criteria
steps.narration: From here, the workflow turns into something reusable. We open a public screen to view companies matching prebuilt criteria.

steps.caption: Step 9: Browse filtered companies and compare PE, ROE, and market cap
steps.description: Browse filtered companies and compare PE, ROE, and market cap
steps.narration: Now the payoff is close enough to see. We browse filtered companies and compare PE, ROE, and market cap.

steps.caption: Step 10: Open Bank of India from the screen for deeper analysis
steps.description: Open Bank of India from the screen for deeper analysis
steps.narration: This is where the result starts to feel earned. We open Bank of India from the screen for deeper analysis.

steps.caption: Step 11: Tutorial complete - you can now research and compare stocks on Screener.in
steps.description: Tutorial complete - you can now research and compare stocks on Screener.in
steps.narration: That lands the result. The flow is ready to replay.
